channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: MPs Demand Hustler Fund to Publish Loan Defaulters and Borrowing Details
item.description: Nairobi — The Hustler Fund, part of Kenya's Financial Inclusion initiative, has been told by MPs to disclose the names of loan defaulters within 14 days. During a session with the National Assembly's ...

item.title: Mother and daughter die in Oklahoma tornado as severe storms continue across central US
item.description: A devastating tornado struck western Oklahoma late on Thursday, tragically killing Jodie Owens, a 47-year-old substitute teacher, and her 13-year-old daughter, Lexi. The pair were found deceased insid...

item.title: Punjab and Haryana HC acquits Dera Sacha Sauda chief in journalist murder case
item.description: In a significant legal development, the Punjab and Haryana High Court on Saturday acquitted Gurmeet Ram Rahim, chief of Dera Sacha Sauda, in connection with the murder of journalist Ram Chander Chhatr...

item.title: Deputy Speaker Benjamin Kalu Denies Allegations of Forged Credentials
item.description: The Deputy Speaker of the House of Representatives, Benjamin Kalu, don burst out to dismiss claims say him forge him credentials. E come through statement wey him Chief Press Secretary, Levinus Nwabug...

item.title: Overview of the Escalating Iran–Israel–US Conflict and Its Regional Impact
item.description: The Middle East has entered another tense period of conflict as hostilities escalate between Israel, the United States, and Iran. Recent weeks have seen the death of Iran’s Supreme Leader Ayatollah Al...

item.title: 'Jab Khuli Kitaab': An Insightful Tale of Marriage, Secrets, and Enduring Love
item.description: The film 'Jab Khuli Kitaab', directed by Saurabh Shukla, is a poignant exploration of long-term relationships and the challenges of trust. The story revolves around Anusuya (Dimple Kapadia) who confes...

item.title: Examining the Role of AI in Recent Iran Strikes
item.description: The ongoing tensions between the United States, Israel, and Iran have seen artificial intelligence deployed in ways previously unseen in military operations. Reports indicate that AI has been used to ...

item.title: UK Experiences Record Temperatures, Hill Snow, and Saharan Dust in 48 Hours
item.description: Over the past 48 hours, the UK has witnessed a remarkable range of weather conditions. England, Wales, and Scotland have all recorded their highest temperatures of the year so far, marking a welcome b...

item.title: US sanctions senior Rwandan officials over involvement in eastern DR Congo conflict
item.description: The US government has imposed visa restrictions on several top Rwandan officials because of their alleged involvement in fuelling unrest in eastern Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC). Secretary of Sta...

item.title: Late MP Johana Ng'eno's Final Message to Wife and Family Life at Nairobi Home
item.description: Kenyans were left emotional following the last public message from the late Emurua Dikirr MP, Johana Ng'eno, to his wife Nayianoi Ntutu, just six days before he tragically died in a helicopter crash. ...

item.title: The Untold History of Mitchell Park and the Legacy of Nellie the Elephant
item.description: Mitchell Park in Morningside, Durban, opened in 1910 as an ostrich farm before quickly transforming into a zoo. During apartheid, the park was a whites-only leisure space with segregated benches, play...

item.title: Nigerian Socialite Danisi Passes Away, Family and Friends Mourn
item.description: Nigerian socialite Danisi, also known as Ego, who was well known for his flashy lifestyle and close friendship with musician Davido, passed away on March 6 in South Africa. He was married to Zimbabwea...

item.title: Suspected Political Thugs Set ADC Ward Office Ablaze in Ubima Ahead of Amaechi’s Party Registration
item.description: For early Friday morning, residents for Ubima, Rivers State, dey report say some political thugs don burn down the African Democratic Congress (ADC) ward office wey dey the hometown of former governor...

item.title: FAAN Workers Demand Review of Automated Points Concession at Omagwa Airport
item.description: Workers from Federal Airport Authority of Nigeria (FAAN) at Omagwa Airport, Portharcourt, through their unions NUATE and ATSSSAN, don give FAAN 72 hours ultimatum to reconsider the recent plan to hand...

item.title: Prince George Ghana Association plans community centre following Independence Day flag raising
item.description: The Ghanaian community in Prince George, B.C., has been strengthened by the city's recognition of Ghana's Independence Day, marked by raising the Ghanaian flag at city hall for the second year in a ro...

item.title: Fred Kubai's Will Awards Estate to Househelp, Leaving Wives Out
item.description: Fred Kubai, one of Kenya's six famous freedom fighters detained by British colonial authorities in 1952, lived a polygamous life but ultimately parted ways with all four of his wives. After serving as...

item.title: Health Crisis in Mpumalanga Linked to Coal Pollution
item.description: Communities in Mpumalanga, South Africa, are facing severe health challenges due to the region's reliance on coal mining and coal-fired power stations. Residents like Sharon Mbonani have experienced c...

item.title: Critique of UK Home Secretary's Claim on Permanent Refugee Status in Proposed Asylum Reforms
item.description: The article critiques recent UK asylum reforms announced by Home Secretary Shabana Mahmood, which introduce temporary refugee status subject to review every 30 months. Mahmood has described current ru...

item.title: Trump Orders Military Action Against Iran Citing Pre-emptive Threat
item.description: United States President Donald Trump has triggered a major conflict with Iran, reportedly based on his own instincts rather than formal analysis or strategic planning. According to statements from Whi...

item.title: The Structural Barriers to Reforming Iran’s Government
item.description: Efforts to reform Iran from within have consistently failed due to the foundational structure of its political system, particularly the doctrine of velayat-e faqih. This principle, which places ultima...
